tier.diamond: DIAMOND is the highest earned tier. OSPREY is by invitation only.
tier.qualifyingNote: Your tier reflects {{points}} qualifying points earned in the last 12 months — separate from the spendable balance above.

travelAgent.title: Travel Agent
travelAgent.intro: Tell me where you'd love to go — I'll find trips for two you can reach with your points.
travelAgent.prompt: Plan a getaway for two travellers that I can afford with my current loyalty points. Suggest a few options, and one to save toward.
travelAgent.error: The travel agent is unavailable right now. Please try again.

help.title: How this works
help.pointsBody: Spendable points are what you redeem for rewards. Your tier is based on qualifying points earned over the last 12 months — a separate figure, which is why a big balance can still sit at a lower tier.
help.tiersBody: You climb from MEMBER through SILVER, GOLD and DIAMOND by earning qualifying points. OSPREY is the invitation-only top tier and is never reached by points alone.
help.rewardsBody: Redeeming a reward spends from your spendable balance. Retrying the same redemption never charges you twice.
